name: ZION OIL & GAS INC
business: Zion Oil and Gas, Inc. is an oil and gas exploration company with a history of 25 years of oil and gas exploration in Israel, currently holding an exploration license in the onshore Megiddo Valleys area. The company has no revenues or operating income, and its ability to generate future revenues depends on successful exploration and exploitation of petroleum rights.

exposures.sentence: Zion Oil and Gas, Inc., a Texas corporation, is an oil and gas exploration company with a history of 25 years of oil and gas exploration in Israel.

catalysts.event: Exploration License 434 expires on September 13, 2026, with four potential 1-year extensions.
catalysts.sentence: This Exploration License 434 is valid for three years until September 13, 2026 with four potential 1-year extensions for a total of seven years until September 13, 2030.

catalysts.event: Rig crew arrived in Israel in January 2026 to begin a new phase of operations at both MJ-01 and MJ-02.
catalysts.sentence: Our rig crew arrived in Israel in January 2026 to begin a new phase of operations at both MJ-01 and MJ-02 in Israel.

catalysts.event: Completed flowback operations at Megiddo-Jezreel #1 well on June 10, 2025.
catalysts.sentence: On June 10, 2025, we completed flowback operations at our Megiddo-Jezreel #1 well (MJ-01), shut the well in and demobilized our crew.
